That is bringing in about, I would say, 80% of the results.
So that's the, I would say, I wouldn't call it exactly in terms of the 80-20 rule, but, you know, it does bring the maturity of the results.
The other stuff that people are talking about, like, you know, vector search and chunking and all of this, that feels more like the 20% of results that just needs to be fine-tuned a bit.

The broad message is that for GEO or AISEO, whatever it is, they're calling it these days, the main implication has been that the brand strength matters.
So things like, as mentioned, Victor, like engagement time on page, brand strength mentions in other publications that are high domain authority, generally a strong brand presence.
So your share of voice almost.
So if you're covering a large number of topics in a really in-depth way with high quality content across a number of searches, we see that a lot of clients tend to show up in LLMs as well.
And within the LLMs themselves, you know, different things matter.
So perplexity seems to be weighing SEO performance pretty high, which makes sense because it's essentially less.
And then GPT and Claw and all these other engines, they seem to weigh brand presence much more.
So one way of the other brand sort of implication here, of course, is that with AI overviews in Google, impressions are now mattering a lot more than they used to.
Previously, we would see like, you know, the impression mattered only in the sense that we want to calculate CTR.
But now the impressions matter as well, because every time you show up in that AI overview, essentially we're showing up at the top of Google, but it's counting as one impression.
So we are weighing impressions a little bit more in our reporting, and we are tracking AI overview presence using SEMrush, because Google doesn't give us that data.
So the reporting in that regard is still a bit behind the curve, but the thought is that impressions do matter quite a lot.
So a declining CTR is, you know, the CTR is still very important, of course.
But it's not the end of the world, because as long as the AI overview presence is pretty high, the CTR or a low CTR or a massively declining CTR might not necessarily be bad news.
That's kind of how we're thinking.

The best approach that we've seen working for clients is getting a right balance between the volume of content we produce, the speed in which we produce it, that is, and the depth within the article.

So articles that generally perform very well and bring the best results, whether it's conversions or whether it's higher visibility, whatever the client's goal is, generally in-depth content that dives into that topic, makes a connection to the product and is really well tailored to the ICP, which is really, I'm just stating basic content marketing facts, right?

## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and collaboration improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team changes: New team members introduced (Vivek, Timmy, Mara)](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Content production: 16 articles staged in CMS last week, integration page FAQs being updated](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [LLM visibility: Focus on brand strength, engagement time, and impressions for AI-driven search](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Workflow improvements: Exploring automation for publishing content directly to Strapi CMS](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)

## Topics

### Team Introduction and Roles

  - [Vivek: Managing Editor, overseeing technical accounts and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Timmy: Content Manager, experienced in generating articles for technical accounts](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Mara: Director (currently out of office), manages overall account success](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

### Content Updates and Performance

  - [16 articles staged in CMS last week](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Integration page FAQs being updated, expected completion this week](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Duplicate content opportunities and pages to refresh listed in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Stable week in terms of performance: clicks rose, CTRs fell slightly, average positions unchanged](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### LLM Visibility and Tracking

  - [LLM referral to be broken out on a separate page in the new Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Basic SEO principles (80% of results) still highly effective for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Brand strength crucial: engagement time, mentions in high-authority publications, and share of voice](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Impressions gaining importance due to AI overviews in Google search results](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)

### Content Production Best Practices

  - [Balance between volume, speed, and depth of content](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [In-depth articles tailored to ICP perform best](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [More data from Strapi (ICP, sales calls, customer success, community discussions) helps create targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Exploring automation for publishing content directly to Strapi CMS](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Strapi team building product marketing agents using Octave for improved ICP data management](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
  - [GrowthX team to demo their custom-built content platform next week](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to action content generation for top 5 competitor comparison pages next week](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [Strapi to share access to updated ICP data in Octave (end of month target)](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate automation possibilities for publishing to Strapi CMS](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [GrowthX to demo their custom content platform in next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)
  - [Ongoing communication and updates to be shared via Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=2122.0)
